text: <par>Kanauri regularly develops a cluster <latinform>st-</latinform> from the PTB sequence <latinform>*sn-</latinform>, see HPTB:103. The <latinform>-i-</latinform> vocalism of these forms is probably explicable in terms of the widespread TB variational pattern of <latinform>*-u- ⪤ -i-</latinform>, cf. HPTB:493-505.</par>
<par>The relationship of Kanauri <latinform>liṭ</latinform> 'egg' to <latinform>lik pā</latinform> 'penis (polite)' is uncertain.</par>
<par>Note the similarity to the Geman form for ‘throat’ : <latinform>go³¹ ɹoŋ³⁵</latinform> (39873).</par>
